title: Hidden Process Thread Model
description: Add all_thread_names field to the UAC process parser. process_name remains main thread (tid==pid). thread_names remains non-main-thread names only. all_thread_names contains both main + non-main thread names.
acceptance_criteria: ParsedProcess struct has all_thread_names: Vec<String> field
all_thread_names includes both the main process name and all non-main thread names
Existing process_name and thread_names fields are unchanged
Test: all_thread_names for a process with main=top and thread=libuv-worker contains both
